zh.lifeSummary: 當William Somes於1572年1月25日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾其勒受洗時，他的父親Thomas Somes33歲，母親Alice Glouer28歲。他於大約1599年與Mrs. William Somes在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾哈德亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Somes于1572年1月25日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾其勒受洗时，他的父亲Thomas Somes33岁，母亲Alice Glouer28岁。他于大约1599年与Mrs. William Somes在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾哈德亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Somes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, with post-medieval excrescent -s, from Saham Toney (Norfolk), Earl and Monk Soham (Suffolk), or Soham (Cambridgeshire), and perhaps also Siam Hall near Newton (Suffolk), all of which share the same etymology (‘lake estate’, Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + hām ‘village, homestead, estate’).

variants.name: Sones
meanings: perhaps an altered form of Soames; see Somes .

variant of Soane, with post-medieval excrescent -s (see Son ). The -o- in Middle English and early modern English son(e) is a conventional spelling of /u/ before an n. This /u/ became /ʌ/ in Standard English, hence the current pronunciation of Son. If /u/ was lengthened it became /o:/ in Middle English, and then /u:/ in modern English, hence the occasional spelling Soon. In some speakers' dialects, however, it seems that Middle English /u/ may have been lowered to /ɔ/ and lengthened to /ɔ:/, becoming modern English /əu/ represented in the spelling Soane. At any rate, Soon and Soane (also Sone) appear together in the same counties and are presumably alternative pronunciations of the same name.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When William Somes was christened on 25 January 1572, in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Somes, was 33 and his mother, Alice Glouer, was 28. He married Mrs. William Somes about 1599, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He was buried in Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Somes a été baptisé le 25 janvier 1572, à Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Somes, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice Glouer, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. William Somes environ 1599, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Ilenterré à Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Somes am 25. Januar 1572 in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom getauft wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Somes 33 und seine Mutter Alice Glouer 28. Er hat um 1599 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. William Somes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er wurde in Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Somes è stato battezzato il 25 gennaio 1572 nel Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Somes, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Alice Glouer, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. William Somes circa 1599, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Fu sepolto a Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Somesが1572年1月25日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチチェリーで洗礼を受けた時，父Thomas Somesは33歳，母Alice Glouerは28歳であった。約1599年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでMrs. William Somesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハードメアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Somes(이)가 1572년 1월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 치셸이에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Somes(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Glouer(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1599년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Mrs. William Somes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 벅잉함실르 하르드미드에 묻혔다.

pt.25 January 1572–4 April 1617: 25 de janeiro de 1572–4 de abril de 1617
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Somes foi batizado em 25 de janeiro de 1572, em Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Somes, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alice Glouer, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. William Somes aproximadamente 1599, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Somes был крещен 25 января 1572 г. в местности шичели, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Somes было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Glouer, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. William Somes около 1599 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности хардмид, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.25 January 1572–4 April 1617: 25 de enero de 1572–4 de abril de 1617
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Somes se bautizó el 25 de enero de 1572, en Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Somes, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alice Glouer, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Mrs. William Somes aproximadamente 1599, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Fue sepultado en Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
